articles.title: Two children among bodies recovered from Israeli attack on southern Lebanon
articles.summary: Two children among bodies recovered from Israeli attack on southern Lebanon Two children and a woman are reported to be among six bodies recovered by emergency teams from the rubble of a residential building in southern Lebanon targeted by an Israeli attack on Monday. The country's civil defence agency said earlier on Tuesday that its teams have been conducting searches in the building, which is located in the town of Marwaniyeh in the Sidon district, since yesterday evening.
